query:
SELECT 
  liverId,
  streamerName,
  SUM(salesAmount) as total_salesAmount,
  SUM(gmv) as total_gmv,
  COUNT(*) as stream_count,
  SUM(duration) as total_duration
FROM brand_livestreams 
WHERE liverId = 120005 
  AND livestreamDate >= '2025-12-01' 
  AND livestreamDate <= '2025-12-31 23:59:59'
GROUP BY liverId, streamerName;
